zh.title: Claude 记忆免费开放并上线迁移工具
zh.subtitle: ChatGPT 卸载量飙升 295%，Anthropic 趁势抢夺用户
zh.tldr: Anthropic 将 Claude 记忆功能向免费用户开放，同步推出竞品记忆导入工具，支持从 ChatGPT、Gemini、Copilot 一键迁移偏好数据。恰逢 OpenAI 签约美国国防部引发 Cancel ChatGPT 运动，ChatGPT 卸载量飙升 295%，Claude 下载量增长 51%，登顶 App Store 免费榜。

keyMetrics.subject: ChatGPT 用户流失与 Claude 增长

rows.note: 对比过去 30 天日均 9% 的卸载波动
OpenAI 国防部合约公布后
原 2025 年 10 月上线付费版，现扩展至免费用户
通过标准化提示词提取竞品记忆数据

keyMetrics.footnote: 下载/卸载数据来源于 TechCrunch 引用的第三方应用商店分析

zh.whatHappened:
2026 年 3 月 2 日，Anthropic 宣布两项重要更新：

- **记忆功能免费开放**：原仅付费用户可用的记忆功能（2025 年 10 月上线）现在向所有免费用户开放，Claude 可跨对话记住用户偏好、项目细节和特定需求
- **竞品记忆导入工具**：推出专用提示词，用户可在 ChatGPT/Gemini/Copilot 中粘贴该提示词提取所有存储的记忆和上下文，以格式化代码块导出，再粘贴到 Claude 记忆设置中完成迁移
- **时机精准**：此举恰逢 OpenAI 于 2 月 28 日宣布与美国国防部签约部署分类网络 AI 模型，引发大规模 Cancel ChatGPT 运动，ChatGPT 卸载量日环比飙升 295%
- **Claude 登顶 App Store**：受益于用户迁移潮和 Anthropic 拒绝国防部监控合约的立场，Claude 登上美国 App Store 免费应用榜首
zh.whyItMatters:
这不只是一次功能更新，而是 AI 行业用户争夺战的标志性事件：

1. **数据可迁移性成为竞争武器**：Anthropic 首次将「导入竞品记忆」作为正式产品功能推出。这意味着 AI 平台的用户锁定效应（记忆/偏好/上下文）正在被打破，用户切换成本大幅降低
2. **价值观驱动的用户迁移**：OpenAI 国防部合约引发的 Cancel ChatGPT 运动表明，AI 公司的政治立场和伦理选择正在直接影响用户决策，这对所有 AI 产品都是警示
3. **免费策略的竞争升级**：记忆功能从付费降级为免费，叠加 ChatGPT 此前向免费用户推送广告的决策，形成鲜明对比——Anthropic 承诺保持无广告
4. **对开发者的直接影响**：如果你在构建基于 LLM 的产品，用户数据可迁移性将成为用户的核心诉求，需要在产品设计中预留数据导入/导出能力

groups.name: ChatGPT 付费用户
groups.description: 面临是否迁移到 Claude 的直接决策，记忆导入工具消除了切换的最大摩擦——不需要从零建立 AI 对你的了解

groups.name: 个人开发者
groups.description: 免费获得 Claude 记忆功能意味着个人项目的 AI 助手体验大幅提升，同时需要关注 AI 平台选择带来的生态影响

groups.name: AI 产品设计者/创业者
groups.description: 记忆导入功能的出现表明数据可迁移性将成为行业标准，需要在自己的产品中预留类似能力

groups.name: 企业 IT 决策者
groups.description: OpenAI 国防部合约引发的伦理争议可能影响企业采购决策，需评估 AI 供应商的政策风险

immediate: 如果你是 ChatGPT 用户并考虑迁移：访问 claude.com/import-memory 获取导入提示词，在 ChatGPT 中运行后将结果粘贴到 Claude 记忆设置，全程约 5 分钟
开启 Claude 免费版的记忆功能（设置 → 记忆 → 开启），开始积累个性化上下文
thisWeek: 对比测试 Claude 和 ChatGPT 在你常用场景下的表现差异（代码生成、写作、分析），不要仅因舆论情绪做迁移决策
如果你在做 AI 产品，评估是否需要在产品中加入用户数据导入/导出功能，参考 Anthropic 的提示词提取方案
watchAndWait: 关注 3 月 3 日 QuitGPT 在 OpenAI 总部的线下抗议及后续影响——这将决定 Cancel ChatGPT 运动是短期情绪还是长期趋势
追踪 OpenAI 是否会做出让步或推出用户挽留措施，以及其他 AI 平台（Google、Meta）的跟进动作

options.name: 立即迁移到 Claude
options.description: 使用记忆导入工具将 ChatGPT 的偏好和上下文迁移到 Claude，将其作为主力 AI 助手
options.suitableFor: 对 OpenAI 国防部合约有伦理顾虑的用户、已经对 Claude 能力满意的用户、想要无广告体验的免费用户
options.cost: 迁移过程约 5-10 分钟；需要适应 Claude 的交互风格差异；付费用户需重新订阅 Claude Pro
options.risk: Claude 在某些任务上可能不如 ChatGPT（如图像生成、插件生态）；Anthropic 同样面临政策风险（已被国防部长列为「供应链风险」）

options.name: 双平台并行使用
options.description: 在两个平台都导入记忆，根据任务类型选择最适合的工具
options.suitableFor: 需要不同 AI 各自优势的用户（如 ChatGPT 的插件生态 + Claude 的长文本能力）
options.cost: 管理两套记忆和偏好设置的认知负担；可能需要同时付费两个平台
options.risk: 低风险策略，但可能分散注意力

options.name: 保持现状
options.description: 继续使用当前 AI 工具，观望局势发展
options.suitableFor: 对当前工具满意、不受伦理争议影响、或所在行业/工作流深度绑定某平台的用户
options.risk: 如果 ChatGPT 用户持续流失，OpenAI 可能调整策略影响产品体验；但短期内核心功能不会受影响

risks.title: 不要因为舆论情绪仓促迁移
risks.description: Cancel ChatGPT 运动声势浩大，但 AI 工具的选择应基于实际需求和能力评估。ChatGPT 在插件生态、图像生成、代码解释器等方面仍有优势。迁移前应在自己的核心使用场景下对比测试，而非被社交媒体情绪驱动决策。

risks.title: 记忆导入不等于完整迁移
risks.description: Anthropic 的导入工具依赖竞品 AI 的「自我报告」——它提取的是对方 AI 记住的内容摘要，而非完整对话历史。导入后 Claude 获得的是简化版的用户画像，可能遗漏重要上下文。需要在使用中持续补充和校正。

risks.title: Anthropic 自身也面临政策风险
risks.description: Anthropic 因拒绝国防部合约被国防部长 Pete Hegseth 列为「供应链风险」。虽然目前这强化了其品牌形象，但如果美国政府对 Anthropic 采取进一步行动（如限制政府机构使用），可能影响其长期发展和企业客户信心。

sources.title: Anthropic 官方记忆导入工具页面
sources.excerpt: 提供标准化提示词，用于从 ChatGPT、Gemini、Copilot 等竞品 AI 中提取存储的记忆和个人偏好数据，导入 Claude 记忆系统。

sources.title: Free Claude users can now use memory and import context from rivals
sources.excerpt: Anthropic 将记忆功能从付费降级为免费，同步上线竞品记忆导入工具。记忆功能 2025 年夏季上线，2025 年 10 月付费版可用，现全量开放。

sources.title: Anthropic Adds Free Memory Feature and Import Tool to Lure ChatGPT Users to Claude
sources.excerpt: 记忆导入流程：在竞品 AI 粘贴提示词 → 获取格式化代码块 → 粘贴到 Claude 记忆设置。同时免费用户获得文件创建、连接器、技能等此前的付费功能。

sources.title: ChatGPT uninstalls surged by 295% after DoD deal
sources.excerpt: ChatGPT 美国卸载量日环比飙升 295%（对比日均 9%），下载量跌 13%。Claude 下载量 27 日涨 37%、28 日涨 51%。QuitGPT 运动号称 150 万人参与。

sources.title: 'Cancel ChatGPT': AI boycott surges after OpenAI-Pentagon military deal
sources.excerpt: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei 表示无法「凭良心」接受国防部对 AI 的无限制访问要求。Anthropic 原合约价值 2 亿美元，因拒绝放宽伦理限制而失去。OpenAI 随后签约。

sources.title: "Cancel ChatGPT" movement goes mainstream — Anthropic refuses to surveil American citizens
sources.excerpt: OpenAI 2 月 28 日确认签约国防部，在分类军事网络部署 AI 模型。Anthropic 拒绝同类合约。QuitGPT 组织计划 3 月 3 日在 OpenAI 旧金山总部进行线下抗议。

en.title: Claude Memory Goes Free with Import Tool
en.subtitle: Anthropic seizes moment as ChatGPT uninstalls spike 295%
en.tldr: Anthropic opened Claude's memory feature to free users and launched an import tool supporting ChatGPT, Gemini, and Copilot migration. The timing coincides with the Cancel ChatGPT movement following OpenAI's DoD deal, driving a 295% surge in ChatGPT uninstalls and a 51% jump in Claude downloads.

keyMetrics.subject: ChatGPT User Exodus vs Claude Growth

rows.note: vs. 9% average daily uninstall rate over past 30 days
Two consecutive days of growth (Feb 27: +37%, Feb 28: +51%)
Originally launched Oct 2025 for paid users, now available to all

keyMetrics.footnote: Download/uninstall data from third-party app store analytics cited by TechCrunch

en.whatHappened:
On March 2, 2026, Anthropic announced two significant updates to Claude:

- **Memory now free for all users**: The memory feature, which launched in summer 2025 and was previously limited to paid subscribers, is now available on the free plan. Claude can remember user preferences, project details, and specific requirements across conversations
- **Competitor memory import tool**: A dedicated prompt at claude.com/import-memory lets users extract stored memories and context from ChatGPT, Gemini, or Copilot and paste them into Claude's memory settings in a formatted code block
- **Strategic timing**: The announcement came days after OpenAI confirmed a deal with the U.S. Department of Defense on February 28 to deploy AI models on classified military networks, sparking the Cancel ChatGPT movement. ChatGPT uninstalls surged 295% day-over-day
- **Claude hits #1 on App Store**: Driven by user migration and Anthropic's refusal to accept the DoD surveillance contract, Claude reached the top of the U.S. App Store free apps chart
en.whyItMatters:
This is not just a feature update but a landmark event in the AI platform competition:

1. **Data portability as a competitive weapon**: Anthropic is the first major AI company to ship a formal product feature for importing competitor memories. This signals that the lock-in effect of AI platforms (memories, preferences, context) is being broken, dramatically lowering switching costs
2. **Values-driven user migration**: The Cancel ChatGPT movement demonstrates that AI companies' political positions and ethical choices directly impact user decisions. This is a warning signal for every AI product company
3. **Free tier competition escalates**: Memory going from paid to free, combined with ChatGPT's earlier decision to show ads to free users in February 2026, creates a stark contrast. Anthropic has committed to keeping Claude ad-free
4. **Developer implications**: If you are building LLM-based products, user data portability will become a core expectation. Design import/export capabilities into your product architecture now

groups.name: ChatGPT Paid Subscribers
groups.description: Face an immediate decision on whether to migrate to Claude. The memory import tool eliminates the biggest friction point — no need to rebuild AI context from scratch

groups.name: Individual Developers
groups.description: Free memory access means significantly better AI assistant experience for personal projects. Also need to consider how AI platform choices affect their development ecosystem

groups.name: AI Product Builders / Founders
groups.description: The memory import feature signals that data portability will become an industry standard. Products should be designed with similar import/export capabilities

groups.name: Enterprise IT Decision Makers
groups.description: The ethical controversy around OpenAI's DoD deal may influence enterprise procurement decisions. Need to assess policy risk of AI vendors

immediate: If you use ChatGPT and are considering a switch: visit claude.com/import-memory, run the provided prompt in ChatGPT, and paste the result into Claude's memory settings. Takes about 5 minutes
Enable memory on Claude's free plan (Settings → Memory → Enable) to start building personalized context
thisWeek: Run a side-by-side comparison of Claude vs ChatGPT on your most common use cases (code generation, writing, analysis). Do not migrate based on social media sentiment alone
If you are building an AI product, evaluate whether to add user data import/export features, referencing Anthropic's prompt-based extraction approach
watchAndWait: Monitor the March 3 QuitGPT protest at OpenAI HQ and its aftermath — this will reveal whether the Cancel ChatGPT movement is a short-term emotional wave or a lasting trend
Track whether OpenAI responds with concessions or retention measures, and how other AI platforms (Google, Meta) react

options.name: Migrate to Claude now
options.description: Use the memory import tool to transfer ChatGPT preferences and context to Claude as your primary AI assistant
options.suitableFor: Users with ethical concerns about OpenAI's DoD deal, those already satisfied with Claude's capabilities, free users wanting an ad-free experience
options.cost: Migration takes 5-10 minutes; need to adapt to Claude's interaction style; paid users need a new Claude Pro subscription
options.risk: Claude may underperform ChatGPT in some areas (image generation, plugin ecosystem). Anthropic also faces policy risk (designated a 'supply chain risk' by Defense Secretary)

options.name: Run both platforms in parallel
options.description: Import memories into both platforms and choose the best tool per task
options.suitableFor: Users who need different AI strengths (e.g., ChatGPT plugins + Claude's long-context capabilities)
options.cost: Cognitive overhead of managing two sets of preferences; may require paying for both subscriptions
options.risk: Low-risk strategy, but may dilute focus

options.name: Stay with current setup
options.description: Continue using your current AI tools and monitor the situation
options.suitableFor: Users satisfied with their current tools, unaffected by the ethical debate, or with workflows deeply integrated into a specific platform
options.risk: If ChatGPT user exodus continues, OpenAI may adjust strategy in ways that affect product experience. But core functionality is unlikely to change short-term

risks.title: Do not migrate based on outrage alone
risks.description: The Cancel ChatGPT movement is emotionally charged, but AI tool selection should be based on actual capability assessment. ChatGPT still has advantages in plugin ecosystem, image generation, and code interpreter. Run side-by-side tests on your core use cases before committing to a switch.

risks.title: Memory import is not a complete migration
risks.description: Anthropic's import tool relies on the competitor AI's self-reported summary — it extracts what the other AI remembers about you, not your full conversation history. The imported profile is a simplified version that may miss important context. Expect to supplement and correct memories over time.

risks.title: Anthropic faces its own policy risks
risks.description: Anthropic was designated a 'supply chain risk' by Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth after refusing the DoD contract. While this currently strengthens its brand with consumers, further government action (e.g., restricting federal agencies from using Claude) could impact Anthropic's enterprise business and long-term viability.

sources.title: Anthropic Official Memory Import Tool
sources.excerpt: Provides a standardized prompt for extracting stored memories and personal preferences from ChatGPT, Gemini, and Copilot, enabling migration to Claude's memory system.

sources.title: Free Claude users can now use memory and import context from rivals
sources.excerpt: Anthropic opens memory feature to free users and launches competitor import tool. Memory originally launched summer 2025, paid-only since October 2025, now available to all.

sources.title: Anthropic Adds Free Memory Feature and Import Tool to Lure ChatGPT Users to Claude
sources.excerpt: Import workflow: paste prompt in competitor AI → receive formatted code block → paste into Claude memory settings. Free users also gain file creation, connectors, and skills features.

sources.title: ChatGPT uninstalls surged by 295% after DoD deal
sources.excerpt: U.S. ChatGPT uninstalls surged 295% day-over-day (vs. 9% average), downloads dropped 13%. Claude downloads rose 37% on Feb 27 and 51% on Feb 28. QuitGPT movement claims 1.5M participants.

sources.title: 'Cancel ChatGPT': AI boycott surges after OpenAI-Pentagon military deal
sources.excerpt: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei stated he 'cannot in good conscience' accept the Pentagon's request for unrestricted AI access. Anthropic walked away from a $200M contract. OpenAI signed the deal hours later.

sources.title: "Cancel ChatGPT" movement goes mainstream — Anthropic refuses to surveil American citizens
sources.excerpt: OpenAI confirmed DoD deal on Feb 28 to deploy AI on classified military networks. Anthropic refused the same contract. QuitGPT planned in-person protest at OpenAI SF HQ on March 3.
